checks.finding: All six goals (REQ-001..REQ-006) resolve to concrete script- or config-level pass/fail outcomes with named artifacts; Edge Cases give concrete boundary conditions.
Every goal is tagged with its issue and traced by at least one acceptance criterion citing the requirement ID; acceptance-tests.md mirrors the REQ column.
All acceptance criteria describe externally observable outcomes (deny/allow decisions, exit codes, document conformance, workflow fail/pass) with a Test Type and Target each.
Non-goals bound five expansion vectors; Assumptions pin the human-copy scope to PROTECTED_GATE_SUFFIXES.
PowerShell 5.1 ASCII-only, read-only short-circuit preservation, human-only copy with SHA-256 manifest, and a three-boundary security table are all stated.
Four risk claims each tie to a named acceptance criterion, test, or documented rationale.
